nasb.text: and when the ship was caught in it and could not face the wind, we gave way to it and let ourselves be driven along.

esv.text: And when the ship was caught and could not face the wind, we gave way to it and were driven along.

cnv.text: 船給風困住了，不能迎風前行，只好隨著風向飄流。

ccb.text: 船被刮得失去控制，我们只好任船随风漂流。

csbs.text: 船被困住，顶不住风，我们只好任凭船被刮走。
